titleStmt.title: SII 37.332: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 332. (A.R. No. B 439 of 1940-41.) Ēnumulachintala, Jammalamaḍugu Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Slab in front of the temple of Āñjanēya.

This is dated Śaka 1473, Saumya, Chaitra ba. 30, Friday, Solar eclipse. However, the cyclic year Saumya falls in the Śaka year 1471 and not in the Śaka year 1473 as mentioned in the record, so that the date of the inscription may be 1549 A.D. April 29.

It registers the gift of a village called Yanamalachintala in the Tāḷḷapodaṭūri-sīma included in Gutti-māgāṇi by Chinna Timmā Nāyuḍu, son of Pemmasāni Timmā Nāyuḍu to god Chintala Tiruveṅgaḷanātha of Tāḍiparti for the merit of the king, Aḷiya Rāmappayya and the donor's parents Timmā Nāyuḍu and Māchamamma on the occasion of solar eclipse.
[Published in Inscriptions of Andhra Pradesh; Cuddapah District, Part II, No. 206.]

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śaka varuṣaṁbu
lu 1473 Agunēṁṭi saumya saṁvatsara caitra ba 30 śu śrīmanmahā
rājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrī sadāsivadē
va mahārāyalu vijayanagaramaṁddu vajrasiṁhvāsanā
ḍuṁḍai pṛthivi sāṁbrājyamu sēyucuṁḍaṁgānu musaḷa
gōtṛlaina peṁmasāni tiṁmānāyanigāri kumāruṁḍu
cina tiṁmānāyanigāru tāḍiparti ciṁtala tiruveṁgaḷa
nāthadēvuniki daṁḍaṁ samarpiṁci śrī sadāsivadēvamahārā
yalu māku nāyaṁkarānaku pāliṁcina gutti mā
gāṇiki cellē tāḍlapodaṭūri sīmalōni cirabaḍisīma
yanamala jiṁtala grāmamu Ī tathātithinisūrya
grahaṇa puṁṇyakālamaṁddu tuṁgabhadrātīramaṁdu
śrī viṭhalēśvaruni saṁnidhini . śrīsadāsiva mahārāya
laku puṁṇyamugānuṁnnu Aḷiya rāmappayyadēva ma
hārājulu gāriki puṁṇyamugānuṁnnutama tallitaṁ
dṟlu tiṁmānāyaṁḍu mācamaṁmagāriki puṁṇya
mugānuṁnnu tāḍiparati ciṁtala śrī tiruveṁgaḷa
nāthadēvuniki Amṛtapaḍikuṁnu Aṁggaraṁgavaibha
vālaku yanamala jiṁtala grāmaṁ dhāravōsi samarpiṁ
stimi Ī yanamala jiṁtala grāmānaku cellē cetusīma
lalōnaina nidhi nikṣēpa jalapāṣāṇa Akṣiṇi Āgāmi
sidasādhyaṁbulaniyeḍi Aṣṭabhōgatējasvāmyāluṁnnu
dhāravōsi samarpiṁstimi . Ani Iccina grāma dharmaśāsa
namu . Ī dharmānaku yavvaru vighnamu dalacinānu kāsi
lōnu gōvadha brāṁhmaṇavadha sēśina pāpānaṁ bōInavā
ru tama mātāpitāḍlanu vadhiṁcina pāpānabōyi
navāru . svadattā dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānupālanaṁ
paradattāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt . maṁgaḷa śrī .
Digital edition of SII 37.332 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
